zh.Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾艾爾姆薩爾
zh.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Mirfield於大約1460年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Oliver Mirfield22歲，母親Isabel Savile21歲。她於1480年與Thomas Wentworth在英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年4月在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Mirfield于大约1460年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Oliver Mirfield22岁，母亲Isabel Savile21岁。她于1480年与Thomas Wentworth在英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年4月在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mirfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Mirfield (WR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Mirfield was born about 1460, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Oliver Mirfield, was 22 and her mother, Isabel Savile, was 21. She married Thomas Wentworth in 1480, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in April 1522, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Mirfield est née environ 1460, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Oliver Mirfield, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel Savile, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wentworth en 1480, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1522, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Mirfield um 1460 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Oliver Mirfield 22 und ihre Mutter Isabel Savile 21. Sie hat 1480 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1522 im Alter von 63 Jahren in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Mirfield è nata il circa 1460 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Oliver Mirfield, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isabel Savile, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wentworth nel 1480, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1522, nel North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Mirfieldが約1460年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Oliver Mirfieldは22歳，母Isabel Savileは21歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでThomas Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年4月にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Mirfield(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Oliver Mirfield(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Savile(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Thomas Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 4월 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Mirfield nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Oliver Mirfield, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Savile, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wentworth em 1480, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1522, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Mirfield родилась около 1460 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Oliver Mirfield было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Savile, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wentworth в 1480 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1522 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Mirfield nació aproximadamente 1460, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Oliver Mirfield, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel Savile, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Wentworth en 1480, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1522, en North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
